creator: hselasky@c2i.net
text:

> diff -urN ./usb.orig/usbdevs ./usb/usbdevs

> +product MELCO WLRUCGAOSS	0x0119	WLR-UC-G-AOSS

>  product MELCO RT2870_2		0x0150	RT2870

> --- ./usb.orig/wlan/if_rum.c	2010-09-01 10:41:33.000000000 +0900
